items.name: reverse-flow-skill
items.title: reverse-flow-skill
items.summary: Codex and AI Agent workflow skill with skills/reverse-flow/SKILL.md, references, scripts, local sandbox defaults, CTF and crackme framing, staged analysis workflow language, and install or run examples that must remain diagnostic.

items.name: Agents-A1
items.title: Agents-A1
items.summary: General agent project with long-horizon trajectories, tool use, selected-domain evaluation code, and benchmark-style validation signals. It has no selected skill package and must enter local agent harness evaluation before behavior adoption.
